uk: Свв. апостолів Сили й Силуана і тих, що з ними.
saints.en: Sts. Apostles Silas & Silvanus, and those with them

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 апп., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар апп., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря апп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. апп.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар апп. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря апп. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і апп. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний апп., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар апп., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря апп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. апп.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – апп.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 2 Кор. 167 зач.; 1, 1-7. Єв. – Мт. 88 зач.; 21, 43-46.

troparion_en.text: Holy Apostles Silas and Silvanus, / entreat the merciful God / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

kontakion_en.text: You were revealed to be branches of the vine of Christ, O wise ones, / bearing clusters of virtues that pour out on us the wine of salvation. / Receiving it, we are filled with gladness, / and we celebrate your most honored memory, apostles of the Lord, Silas and Silvanus. / Therefore, intercede that great mercy and remission of sins may be granted to us.

troparion.text: Holy Apostles Silas and Silvanus, / entreat the merciful God / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

kontakion.text: You were revealed to be branches of the vine of Christ, O wise ones, / bearing clusters of virtues that pour out on us the wine of salvation. / Receiving it, we are filled with gladness, / and we celebrate your most honored memory, apostles of the Lord, Silas and Silvanus. / Therefore, intercede that great mercy and remission of sins may be granted to us.

kontakion.text: You were revealed to be branches of the vine of Christ, O wise ones, / bearing clusters of virtues that pour out on us the wine of salvation. / Receiving it, we are filled with gladness, / and we celebrate your most honored memory, apostles of the Lord, Silas and Silvanus. / Therefore, intercede that great mercy and remission of sins may be granted to us.

troparion.text: Holy Apostle Crescens, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Epenetus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.
Holy Apostle Andronicus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

oca_saints.name: Martyr John the Soldier at Constantinople

troparion.text: Loving the blessedness of the Gospel, O divinely-wise John,  / you have glorified the purity of your heart with virginity.  / Therefore you rejected the vanity of this world, hastening to the contemplation of God,  / Who glorified you with miracles of healing, to treat various sufferers. /  Therefore, we implore you: "Entreat Christ the Lord to deliver us from all sorrows,  / and that we may obtain the Kingdom of Heaven."

kontakion.text: You were revealed as a great joy for those who suffer misfortunes, O wonderworker John,  / for you heal all the illnesses of those who pray to you by fulfilling their requests.  / Therefore, even now, entreat the Lord  / that He may save us by His mercy.

oca_saints.name: Uncovering of the relics of Venerable Herman of Solovki

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Herman, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Polychronius, Bishop of Babylon, and those with him

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Valentine, Bishop of Interamna, Terni in Italy, and those with him

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

The image of God was truly perserved in you, O Mother, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away, / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, O venerable Angelina, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: Longing to be worthy of the heavenly life, you voluntarily gave up earthly food,  / and distributed your wealth to the poor; for you were given heavenly riches.  / You enlighten us after your repose, and you shine forth with miracles, O all-laudable Angelina. /  Therefore, we honor your holy repose by singing: Hail, most praised Mother.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Anatole, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Champion of Orthodoxy, teacher of purity and of true worship, / the enlightener of the universe and the adornment of hierarchs: / all-wise father Tsotne, your teachings have gleamed with light upon all things. / Intercede before Christ God to save our souls.

oca_saints.name: Velikorets Icon of Saint Nicholas the Wonderworker

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith,  /  an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence;  / your humility exalted you; /  your poverty enriched you.  /  Hierarch Father Nicholas,  /  entreat Christ our God  /  that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: You revealed yourself, O Saint, in Myra as a priest,  /  for you fulfilled the Gospel of Christ  /  by giving up your soul for your people,  /  and saving the innocent from death.  /  Therefore you are blessed as one become wise in the grace of God.
